description: Composition Black track pants made of 100% polyester, has a comfortable elastic waistband with a drawstring, mesh inner, two pockets on the sides and a printed branding below the left pocket Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry Use warm iron do not iron on decorations Get cosy at home this winter or enjoy those heated runs in the early morning mist in this pair of track pants from puma. Created using polyester, this fabric wicks sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with a T-shirt and sports shoes to suit your comfort and style. Model statistics The product is of size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32&rdquo
